items.title: For Dutch speedskater, age doesn’t matter.
items.description: Jorrit Bergsma, a gold medalist back in 2014, is now 40. But he rolled back the years to win gold.

items.title: The Queen Stuck by Prince Andrew. King Charles Is Pulling Away
items.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, the former prince, is getting no help from the throne as the crisis over his ties to Jeffrey Epstein intensifies.

items.title: At Least 10 Killed in Lebanon, Officials Say, After Israel Strikes Hezbollah
items.description: The Lebanese militant group said eight of its members were among those killed late Friday. The attacks threaten to further destabilize an already tenu...

items.title: Klaebo Makes Olympic History: Unforgettable Photos from 6-Gold Sweep
items.description: Johannes Klaebo won his sixth cross country gold medal at the 2026 Olympics.

items.title: Young Skaters Assist With Figure Skating Competitions While Aspiring to the Olympics
items.description: Young skaters known as flower kids jump into action. They have their own Olympic dreams.
